title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
